title: US blockade would worsen global energy crisis, FAO food warning
snippet: Analysts warn blockade would worsen global energy crisis — largest oil supply disruption in history. FAO warns global food crisis. Tanker traffic plunged from pre-war 135 ships/day to 4-10. Blockade risks drawing ire from China and India.
tag_reason: New comprehensive analysis of blockade's economic impact. FAO food warning and traffic statistics (135→4-10) are new data.
